report.summary: Researched, wrote, SEO-optimized, and scaffolded two new learn guides — Kaito AI & InfoFi and BTCFi — including an interactive BTCFiProtocolExplorer component, both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Identified two high-priority content gaps: Kaito AI / InfoFi (no existing guide; March 2026 Polymarket partnership is a live news hook) and BTCFi (bitcoin-layer-2-guide exists but no dedicated DeFi yield guide)
Kaito AI launched Attention Markets with Polymarket in March 2026 — $5.8B weekly Polymarket volume makes this highly timely
BTCFi TVL grew from $304M (Jan 2024) to $7.1B (Nov 2025) — 2,237% growth; only 0.46% of all BTC is in DeFi
Verified no existing Kaito ecosystem page or InfoFi learn guide in codebase
Confirmed no existing /learn/btcfi* page; /learn/bitcoin-layer-2-guide exists but does not cover yield/DeFi

sections.title: Content Created
items: Kaito AI & InfoFi Guide — covers InfoFi concept, how Kaito works, KAITO token, Yaps history, Attention Markets, how to use for alpha, risks, 6-question FAQ (761 lines)
BTCFi: Bitcoin DeFi Guide 2026 — covers BTCFi definition, technology stack, top protocols, 5 yield strategies ranked by risk, wrapped BTC trust comparison table, risks, 6-question FAQ (810+ lines)

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Kaito title tag: 57 chars (under 60 limit); primary keyword 'Kaito AI & InfoFi' front-loaded
BTCFi title tag: 54 chars (under 60 limit); primary keyword 'BTCFi Guide 2026' front-loaded
Both descriptions in 155–160 char range with primary keywords and differentiators
Article schema + FAQ schema (6 FAQs each) rendered via StructuredData component
Internal links: each page links to 4 related degen0x guides
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts
TypeScript check: 0 errors in all new files

sections.title: Interactive Component
items: BTCFiProtocolExplorer.tsx — 8 BTCFi protocols, filterable by type / risk / EVM compat, sortable by TVL / risk / trust model / name
